invariant: A well-formed account filter for a subject owned by another workspace fails closed with SubjectNotOwned even when that subject has active open loops.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = list_open_loops returns AbilityError::SubjectNotOwned for acct-b10-other-workspace and does not return an empty loops list. FAIL = active other-workspace open_loop rows are silently treated as zero results.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Mirrors bundle-10 tables and adds subject_ownerships so the other-workspace account ownership is explicit.
fixture_design_notes.inputs: Entity-scope list_open_loops call for account acct-b10-other-workspace.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: Typed hard error, not OpenLoopsResult emptiness.
fixture_design_notes.provider_replay: Empty because list_open_loops is a pure Read ability with no provider call.
